description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden desk with a dark brown finish and visible red stains on its surface and front panel, suggesting signs of wear or spillage. On top of the desk, there is a black computer monitor with blue headphones resting on its side, a black cylindrical cup, and a black office phone with a green display and keypad. The desk has a solid, blocky construction with no visible drawers or compartments, and its surface is flat and spacious, suitable for office work. The wood grain texture is visible, giving the desk a classic, sturdy appearance. The overall design is utilitarian, with no decorative elements, and the objects on the desk indicate it is set up for computer-based tasks or communication. The desk's size and features suggest it is intended for use in a professional or administrative environment.
description: A large, dark brown wooden desk with red stains, featuring a computer monitor with blue headphones, a black cup, and an office phone on its flat surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the desk, red stains on the surface and front panel, and all desktop items clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the monitor and headphones are most prominent, and the phone and cup are partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the monitor, the cup, and the phone, with red stains visible on the desk surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the phone and cup, with the monitor and headphones seen from behind.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the computer monitor, phone, and cup arranged for easy access; this is the front of the desk, while the opposite long edge is the back.
